text.p: I'm very glad to hear your voice today. Thanks for taking the pains to call. I really appreciate it. God who has started His work in you this year MUST surely give you an expected end. He has promised and cannot renege on His word without accomplishing it. Remember, that it's your SEASON OF RESTORATION & PLENTY. He has decided that NOW is the hour of your visitation. Weep no more for He has promised you comfort for the departed. For once, start smiling in anticipation of His benevolence in you. I'm envious of what He will do in your life this year. When it is well with you, don't forget your little in o! Take care ma, Bye.
